name: Golden Cod
recipeIngredient: 6 large potatoes, peeled and cut into thin julienne strips
about 1 quart vegetable oil (for frying the potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. If the cod is salted, soak it in cold water for at least 12 hours, changing the water 3 or 4 times. Drain the cod.
2. Place the cod in a saucepan with enough water to cover by 1 inch. Bring to boil over high heat, then reduce to simmer for about 20 minutes. Drain thoroughly and discard any skin or bones. Shred the fish.
3. Deep-fry the potatoes in hot oil until crisp golden. Remove from oil and transfer to a Pyrex baking dish.
4. In a heavy skillet, heat olive oil over moderate heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until transparent.
5. Add the shredded cod, half-and-half, and simmer over very low heat, stirring frequently for about 10 minutes.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the potatoes in the baking dish. Add more olive oil if desired.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Serves 4-6 people.
